hook.text: ROONEY'S INCREDIBLE MESSAGE TO MAINOO REVEALED

beats.text: THE MESSAGE CAME ON THE EVE OF HIS WC DEBUT
THE UNITED LEGEND SENT MAINOO A HEARTFELT PERSONAL NOTE
THE YOUNG RED IS READY FOR THE WORLD STAGE

caption: One of the most touching stories at this World Cup 🔴 Kobbie Mainoo — United's homegrown engine — has shared a heartfelt personal message he received from club legend Wayne Rooney, on the eve of his World Cup finals debut. One Red Devil wishing the next generation well. How far do you think England go in this tournament? 👇 #mufc #manutd #premierleague #football #kobbiemainoo #worldcup #england
